description: Machine-readable diagnostic rules. Each rule maps an observable metric signature to a verdict, a root-cause hypothesis, and a prioritised action. Adlytic AI uses these to ground every recommendation. Conditions reference metric keys defined in the metric modules. `severity` aligns with threshold_semantics; `pattern` aligns with Adlytic PatternEngine signatures where applicable.
evaluation_notes: Prefer per-account relative baselines over absolute benchmark thresholds when a baseline exists.
Never fire a single-metric verdict when a multi-signal rule covers the case (multi-signal cuts false positives).
Cold-start guard: if the campaign lacks statistically meaningful history (zero/near-zero baselines), suppress delta-based rules and report collection status only.

rules.name: Healthy scalable winner
rules.when: ROAS >= strong AND CPA <= target AND frequency within range AND CTR stable-or-rising
rules.diagnosis: Creative and audience are converting efficiently with headroom.
rules.action: Scale budget 20-30% per step; duplicate into new audiences; produce creative variations to sustain.
rules.do_not: Do not raise budget >30% in one step (resets learning).

rules.name: Dying creative (fatigue)
rules.when: frequency rising AND CTR down >20-30% from baseline AND (CPA up OR CPM up)
rules.diagnosis: Audience saturated; the ad has fatigued.
rules.action: Introduce fresh creative; expand audience; exclude recent converters; reduce budget on the fatigued ad.
rules.do_not: Do not increase budget on the fatigued ad.

rules.name: Post-click leak
rules.when: CTR healthy AND CVR below average AND CPA rising
rules.diagnosis: Front-end is fine; the leak is post-click (landing page, offer, checkout).
rules.action: Audit landing page speed/UX, message match, pricing, and checkout friction. Do not touch the creative first.
rules.do_not: Do not blame or kill the creative.

rules.name: Weak hook
rules.when: hook_rate < 15% (video)
rules.diagnosis: Opening 3 seconds fail to stop the scroll.
rules.action: Rework the first 3 seconds: lead with motion/face/claim; remove intro branding.
rules.do_not: Do not scale spend before the hook is fixed.

rules.name: Good hook, weak hold
rules.when: hook_rate >= 25% AND hold_rate < 20%
rules.diagnosis: Hook over-promises; the body does not pay it off.
rules.action: Pay off the hook immediately; tighten pacing; move message/CTA earlier; shorten to 15-30s.
rules.do_not: Do not lengthen the video.

rules.name: Auction cost spike
rules.when: CPM up >20% week-over-week AND CTR stable AND CVR stable
rules.diagnosis: External auction competition/seasonality, not a creative problem.
rules.action: Broaden placements/audience to access cheaper inventory; accept seasonal inflation; protect ROAS via AOV levers.
rules.do_not: Do not kill creative that is still converting.

rules.name: Frequency saturation on small audience
rules.when: frequency > 4 (cold) AND reach plateaued AND spend rising
rules.diagnosis: Budget is over-saturating a small audience.
rules.action: Expand audience or add lookalikes before adding budget; rotate creative; cap frequency.
rules.do_not: Do not keep scaling budget on a fixed small pool.

rules.name: Learning Limited
rules.when: purchases/ad set/week < 50 AND status = Learning Limited
rules.diagnosis: Too few optimisation events to stabilise delivery.
rules.action: Consolidate ad sets, raise budget, or switch to a higher-volume optimisation event to reach ~50 events/week.
rules.do_not: Do not fragment budget across many tiny ad sets.

rules.name: Checkout friction
rules.when: checkout_initiated strong AND IC->Purchase < 50%
rules.diagnosis: High intent is leaking at payment/checkout.
rules.action: Guest checkout, wallets, transparent fees, trust badges; test checkout end-to-end; retarget IC non-purchasers.
rules.do_not: Do not increase top-funnel spend to mask a broken checkout.

rules.name: Tracking loss suspected
rules.when: platform ROAS down sharply AND MER stable
rules.diagnosis: Attribution/tracking loss, not real performance loss.
rules.action: Verify pixel + Conversions API parity; check event dedup; steer by MER until restored.
rules.do_not: Do not cut budget on a falsely-low platform ROAS.

rules.name: Unprofitable despite conversions
rules.when: CPA > break-even OR ROAS < 1/margin
rules.diagnosis: Spending above sustainable acquisition economics.
rules.action: Pause or restructure; lift AOV; fix the dominant cost driver (CPC/CPM/CVR); re-target max-sustainable-CPA.
rules.do_not: Do not scale a converting-but-unprofitable campaign.

rules.name: Low-quality lead flood
rules.when: CPL at/below target AND qualified-lead rate falling
rules.diagnosis: Cheap leads of poor quality (often instant-form, low intent).
rules.action: Add qualifying questions; pre-qualify in creative; optimise to offline QUALIFIED-lead event.
rules.do_not: Do not celebrate low raw CPL while sales quality drops.

rules.name: Messaging cost drift
rules.when: cost_per_message > account baseline by >25%
rules.diagnosis: Conversations getting more expensive vs the account's own baseline.
rules.action: Test message-led creative and clearer CTA; refine greeting/qualifier; refresh creative on fatigue; reduce CPM.
rules.do_not: Do not sum overlapping messaging events (inflates the count).

rules.name: Cold start — insufficient data
rules.when: baselines zero/near-zero OR confidence still collecting
rules.diagnosis: Not enough history for trustworthy deltas.
rules.action: Report current absolute readings only; gather more impressions; avoid drastic changes.
rules.do_not: Do not cite delta percentages against a zero baseline.

rules.name: Stable performer — hold
rules.when: ROAS at target AND CPA at target AND metrics flat within tolerance
rules.diagnosis: Performance is normal; no intervention required.
rules.action: Hold and monitor; queue creative for the eventual fatigue cycle.
rules.do_not: Do not make changes that reset learning without cause.

rules.name: Unstable noise
rules.when: metrics swinging widely day-to-day with low volume
rules.diagnosis: Volatility from low statistical volume, not a real trend.
rules.action: Aggregate over a longer window; avoid reacting to single days; consolidate for volume.
rules.do_not: Do not make decisions on one noisy day.

rules.name: Emergency budget bleed
rules.when: rapid spend with near-zero conversions in a short live window (velocity hemorrhage)
rules.diagnosis: Money burning intra-day without results.
rules.action: Emergency pause to protect capital; review creative and targeting before relaunch.
rules.do_not: Do not wait a full day if the bleed rate is severe.

rules.name: Relevance-driven cost
rules.when: CPM high AND any relevance ranking Below Average
rules.diagnosis: Low relevance is inflating delivery cost.
rules.action: Fix the specific weak ranking (quality->creative, engagement->resonance, conversion->landing page).
rules.do_not: Do not treat the three rankings as one score.

rules.name: Cart abandonment recovery
rules.when: cart_abandonment_rate > 80%
rules.diagnosis: Large recoverable late-funnel audience.
rules.action: Abandoned-cart retargeting + email; reduce checkout friction; add urgency/reassurance.
rules.do_not: Do not treat abandonment as unrecoverable.

rules.name: AOV erosion
rules.when: ROAS down AND CPA flat AND AOV falling
rules.diagnosis: ROAS decline is driven by smaller orders, not higher cost.
rules.action: Bundles, upsells, free-shipping thresholds; feature higher-margin SKUs; cut blanket discounts.
rules.do_not: Do not cut spend before addressing the AOV cause.
